name: Titan's Gauntlet
description: Grants +2 Strength at the start of combat.

name: Guardian's Aegis
description: Grants 8 Shield at the start of combat.

name: Phoenix Feather
description: Grants Regeneration 3 for 3 turns at combat start.

name: Arcane Battery
description: Start combat with +1 Energy for the first turn.

name: Venom Vial
description: Apply 2 Poison to enemy at combat start.

name: Scholar's Tome
description: Draw 1 extra card at combat start.

name: Inferno Core
description: Apply 2 Burn to enemy at combat start.

name: Cursed Gauntlet
description: Grants +4 Strength but lose 5 HP at combat start.

name: Void Battery
description: Start with +2 Energy but take 3 damage each turn.

name: Forbidden Tome
description: Draw 2 extra cards but lose 10 Max HP.

name: Divine Heart
description: Grants +30 Max HP and Regeneration 2 for 5 turns.

name: Holy Relic
description: Grants +3 Strength and 10 Shield at combat start.

name: Lucky Talisman
description: Start with +2 Energy and draw 1 extra card.
